That said, we would like to respectfully clarify that some details mentioned in your review do not accurately reflect the events as they occurred. 
We understand that perceptions and expectations can vary, and we are truly sorry if any aspect of your stay left you feeling dissatisfied. Rest assured that your feedback has been taken seriously and shared with our department heads for further review and staff training. Our commitment remains to provide a fair, welcoming, and high-quality experience for all guests.
We hope that, despite this incident, you may give us another opportunity in the future to deliver the level of service we are known for.
Warm regards,
Tran Manh Hung - General Manager

reviews.text: Well, i woke up late by and missed the breakfast for 10 mins. Terribly disappointed despite good reviews before i choose this hotel.

My partner and I came from a late flight and just wanted to get settle in asap. Once we arrived, we were the only ones at reception to be served. The reception team began having issues finding our booking and proceeding to tell us to sit down and wait to fix it. While we were waiting, an influx of guests came in requesting assistance from reception. The reception team begun assisting them and completely disregarded our check-in. After 20 or so minutes when the guests disappeared, I finally got up and asked reception again. Turns out, NO ONE was even attending to our check-in and we were waiting for NOTHING.
By the time we finally got to our average room, they gave us separate beds (when we're clearly a couple) and the room smelt like cigarette smoke. 
It's safe to say I WILL NOT RECOMMEND THIS HOTEL TO ANYONE.

Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your feedback. We would like to clarify that our check-out time is 12:00 PM. On your departure day, we offered you a complimentary late check-out until 12:45 PM, but you still had not checked out by then. Our team made several calls, and you eventually checked out at around 1:15 PM — 75 minutes past the official time, not 10 minutes as mentioned.

According to our policy, a 30% late check-out fee should have been applied, as late check-outs can affect incoming guests. However, as a gesture of goodwill, we did not charge you any fee.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

reviews.title: 2nd Visit
reviews.text:
From my last stay in this hotel, I thought it was amazing so I booked again this time. Sadly it was not what I was expecting from my previous stay.

We were only given one key card because they did not have any available. We got into the room and the furnishing was worn down significantly and the A/C was barely working. The digital weight scale did not work after three attempts by housekeeping trying to replace the battery so we gave up. Alot of mold in the bathroom and the shower head had some issues probably due to rust.  There was only one pillow whereas previously there was two as I took pictures from my last stay and I can tell the difference. The doorman was busy talking to his co-worker and not opening the door for guests. The breakfast was a let-down, I remember there were a lot of great options but this time, there wasn't much and the food lack flavour.

I went into the swimming pool at around 8pm and the pool was open but shortly a security came and I realized that they close at 7pm but why was the door and the pool open at 8pm that I was able to walk in and swim.

Overall, it was a huge disappointment and was not the same experience from my previous stay.

reviews.title: bad experience
reviews.text:
i travelled with wife and baby boy.  when we first arrived at the door of our room, there was a used toothbrush right in front.  in the washroom there were a pair of used cleaning gloves that the staff forgot to get rid of.  my baby and myself were bitten by mosquitos, of which we managed to kill 4.  the air conditioner in the room was old and placed at the entrance far from the bed and tv, it took 3 hours on max to get the room cool.  in a city like saigon where it was 35C during the day, that is not good enough.
the buffet breakfast has limited options and are comparable to a small local hotel, not a big hotel like muong thanh.  location is good but not ideal, if u want to experience the hustle and bustle of saigon, do not stay here.

during checkout, the staff blamed my 1 year old son of writing on their walls and wanted us to pay for it.  firstly, he did not do it, we know bc there is someone right beside him at all times he is awake.  even at home he does not write on walls.  we checked in at around 9 pm, so he had a bottle and went to sleep, the next morning we went to breakfast and went to the zoo, there wasnt any time for him to even write on walls.  i am offended that they tried to put the blame on us and get us to pay for what someone else did.  i will not be returning bc there is far better value elsewhere

reviews.title: Wir planen bereits den nächsten Aufenthalt in diesem Hotel

Uns war das Hotel bereits bekannt und wir haben unseren Aufenthalt genossen.
Das Hotel liegt sehr zentral in unmittelbarer Nähe zum Konsulat der USA, Frankreich, Großbritannien und dem  Deutschen Haus, in dem das Deutsche Konsulat zu finden ist.
Beste Lage. Nicht weit zum Saigon River.
Super freundliches Personal in allen Bereichen des Hotels.

reviews.title: shower no hot water even for executive room
reviews.text:
shower no hot water even for executive room and;
the staff is stupid. 
The staff said the drawer in room got damage and require fee when we check out. I told them i had never open the drawer, how come can make it broke? Should i need to check all furniture in the room during my stay so to avoid the ridiculous charges?

finally they wont charge after i complaint them.

reviews.title: staff are not flexible and liar.
reviews.text:
total rate in good hotel. 

but we have 3 complains, we requested on our requested box in agoda for twin beds for executive suite room. but staff told us that there is no twin beds in executive suite room floor. so, i gave up about twin beds. but next morning, when i came out from room and they were room kepper in our floor and cleaning some executive suite rooms, so i could see other executive suite room and found that they have twin beds... so, i relaized that staff on that day tell lie to us... which made us awful feeling. 

also, i found showar room facility is not good, especially glass door between shower room and toilet. it not closed well and during using water come out or leakage from glass door and wet on both toilet floor and floor towel.

last, between toilt room and room have a step, which we feel quite high step, due to we hits our foot 2 times on this step. we are still young, but if elder person stay in this room, we afraid of fall down.

break fast  is good, many choices.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Lage war super. Das Frühstuck ist auch in Ordnung. Das Zimmer ist sehr groß und man hat viel Platz um sich auszubreiten.
reviews.negatives: Unser Zimmer hat anfangs noch leicht nach Rauch gerochen. Im Bad fehlten uns ein paar Ablagemöglichkeiten, die wir dann ins Zimmer verlagert haben.

reviews.title: Where do I begin
reviews.text:
The bad things about this new hotel.
a) Check in is 2pm, I arrived at 4pm to be told my room is not ready, please wait in the lobby. This is simply not good enough, when arriving 2 hours after the advertised check in time.   b)  I checked in 2 people with 2 i.d."s   as the 2nd guest was not arriving until later, they would not issue 2 room keys.  c)  the rooms..  the room look cheap, like a cheap ikea fit out, the room smell like a farm, I guess from the cheap timber finishings. d)  The water pressure in the shower is weak & it took ages for the water to get warm, it never even made it to HOT.  There is no soap dish in the shower, to place shampoo or soap etc.  what a slip hazard to have soap on the floor shower & not so hygienic.  e) The air con is above the door, what a stupid location, as u have a corridor through to the bedroom, cannot hardly even feel the air con due to its location.  f)  The breakfast is very average, not a lot of choice & the orange juice is not fresh G)  I can hear the tv from the other room on the floor above.  h)  i asked for extra pillows, they were bought to the room,  tho without pillow cases,  so I send them away to fetch cases,   hmmm this hotel has some learning to do,  then it will be ok   hopefully,

reviews.positives: Posizione ottima della struttura. La stanza assegnatami era molto ampia, comoda e pulita. Inoltre, abbiamo usufruito per due cene del ristorante e devo dire che l'esperienza è stata ben al di sotto delle aspettative. Moltissimi piatti indicati nel menù non erano disponibili. Da rivedere soprattutto il servizio che, in entrambe le occasioni, è stato lento e confusionario, sebbene lo staff si sia sempre dimostrato molto cordiale.

Location is 10-12 minutes walk from the main area (Main Plaza, Restaurants and Bars ) The hotel is old and dirty. Rooms get very hot and It was impossible to get a comfortable temperature for a good night of sleep. The spa is a mysterious place....we stayed  3 nights and we were not able to get an appointment....one time we saw the masseuses wearing mini skirts and short t-shirts.....We think it was not really a spa but some other type of massage place HEM. Save your money and stayed in a better hotel.

reviews.title: Not welcome and inflexible Reception policy
reviews.text:
We arrived at noon time and try to see if their rooms are available so we can check in first. They said not yet available. . 
We left our luggages and went for lunch and back at 1:30pm. 
Try to ask if we can check in earlier. 
The reception insisted that the check in time is 2pm, so they cannot allow us to check in earlier than this time even the rooms are ready. 
We are a group of 10 people with a baby, a Senior, and 3 children.  We said to the reception that hotels in anywhere of the world would allow a bit early checkin if rooms are available.  They insisted check in time is 2pm, then make copies of all our passports. 
We have booked a half day tour at 1:30pm, so have to leave at that time.

When we came back at 5:30pm, we found our luggages just left somewhere at the public area of reception that no body was actually looking after.  Their security system is very weak! 

Not recommended for family with children

reviews.title: Good hotel but bad service
reviews.text: I stayed for 2 nights at this hotel for the convenience location next to the US Embassy.  Front lobby was nice and clean, plenty of sitting space. My room was spacious and comfortable. My only disappointment is the breakfast buffet. It open from 6am to 9:30am. I was there at 8:30am and most of the food were empty and they don't refill, and from the look of it there were not many options either.  I think they should change their hours to from 6-8am so that the guests  will not be disappointed as I was. For a 4 stars hotel, and the price I had paid, I expected a better service.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share your feedback.

We are glad you enjoyed our convenient location, spacious rooms, and welcoming lobby. We sincerely apologize that during the busy breakfast hours, some dishes were not replenished as quickly as we aim for. Our team works hard to provide timely service, but at peak times, delays can unfortunately occur.

Please rest assured this does not reflect the overall standard of our service, and we are continuously working to improve the dining experience to meet our guests’ expectations.

We truly appreciate your understanding and hope to welcome you again soon for an even better stay.

Warm regards,
Tran Manh Hung - General Manager

reviews.title: Passable, but would not stay there again
reviews.positives: We stayed in the executive suite which was extremely roomy.
reviews.negatives:
Only 1 bottle of drinking water provided free of charge each day. Also no amenities I. The room like drinking glasses, bottle opener etc. Toiletries (shower gel, shampoo etc) was limited to one small tube each per day instead of provided as dispensers in the shower.

Additionally our toilet did not flush properly and took up to 4 flushes just to clear the bowl. Hot water took 5 mins to warm up and water pressure was poor.

90% of the staff were dismissive, inattentive and could not raise a smile to save their lives.  The other 10% of staff were pleasant and welcoming.

Make sure you get to breakfast early as foods and juices are not replenished at any pace to keep up with demand.

I was there during the construction of the Highlands Coffee inside the hotel, so it was pretty

I'm staying at another hotel in NYC longer term, experiencing better services than Muong Thanh, that brought back lots of bad memories at Muong Thanh.

The swimming pool on the 11th floor is great too. The breakfast spread is elaborate.
reviews.negatives:
The front office staff are lousy. Either they are not adequately trained or are very arrogant behaving as if they own the hotel.

They also have a lady in the sales department, a  Ms Kahn. She writes long lengthy letters - utterly meaningless because there is no further action on any issue that you take up with her. Whenever an issue is raised, a sweet letter follows, but for a resolution - ZERO!

reviews.title: Disappointing Experience: Not Worth the Price for a 4-Star Hotel
reviews.text:
I stayed at this hotel recently and, unfortunately, I can't recommend it. For a 4-star hotel, I expected much more. First off, the shower curtain had visible mold on it, which was really off-putting and made me question the cleanliness standards of the hotel.

The amenities were pretty lacking—nothing too special to make the stay memorable or comfortable. The breakfast options were also disappointing, with very limited choices, especially considering the price point. For what I paid, I expected more variety and better quality food.

Overall, this hotel didn’t meet expectations, and I wouldn’t stay here again. There are definitely better options out there for the same price or even less.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are truly sorry to learn that your stay did not meet your expectations, especially for a 4-star experience.

We sincerely apologize for the condition of the shower curtain you encountered. This is certainly not acceptable, and your comment has been shared with our Housekeeping team for immediate review and corrective action. Cleanliness is a top priority for us, and we regret that this fell short during your stay.

We also appreciate your comments regarding the amenities and breakfast selection. Your feedback about the limited variety and overall value has been forwarded to our Management and Culinary teams as we continue to review and improve our offerings.

We understand your disappointment and regret that we did not have the opportunity to deliver a more positive and memorable experience. Thank you again for your honest feedback, which is valuable to us as we work to improve our services.

Best regards,
Trầ

reviews.title: Could be a nicer place with attention to service and a reasonable price
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel was good as we could walk to most places of interest. The bed was comfortable and I the shower hot.
reviews.negatives:
It’s  just a lot of the little things that add up to spoil what could be a nice hotel. For example, one serving of a welcome cake when clearly two are booked and staying in the room. No hello or good bye when you arrive or depart from the front staff who always appear to have their heads down or talking with each other. It makes the hotel feel  impersonal. 
The room layout is strange with a big window in bathroom that looks out on the passage way inside the room. There is a small lip between the bathroom and passage way, just big enough to stub your toes. I know, I did! 
Lots of lights in the room but none over the mirror in the bathroom nook, making it a dark spot. No iron for guests to borrow. 
Breakfast is ordinary. The coffee is terrible. Things are not replenished in a timely way. For example, no spoons when you need them. Also, the fruit is served in not peeled. 
We won’t  stay here again. It’s too impersonal and expensive for what you get.

We appreciate your understanding and hope to welcome you again.
Warm regards,
Tran Manh Hung (Mr.) - General Manager

reviews.title: Nice hotel, but do not use the spa!
reviews.positives: The location was nice - very central, with a lot of Ho Chi Minh landmarks within 10 - 20 minutes walking distance. A lot of nice restaurants and coffee shops around too. The staff was really nice and very helpful. The bedroom was comfortable.
reviews.negatives: I booked a package at the spa and the experience was uncomfortable, to say the least. It felt like it was targeting middle aged dodgy business men looking for some sort of happy ending. The woman giving the massage was wearing a super short skirt, shirt unbuttoned to show bra, high heels, lipstick... but the weirdest thing about the experience is that they give you a private room with sauna, steam room, etc, and she is just in the room the whole time, staring at you. The staring continues while you are changing clothes. They dont really speak English, so it was pointless voicing how bothered I was. The massage itself was not even good - quite agressive even. Not really what I expected booking a spa service at a 4-star hotel....

reviews.title: Absolutely love the location
reviews.text:
We had an amazing stay at the hotel. Location was fantastic, we were of a walking distance away from the Cathedral & HCM book street. We could see the night skyline from our side of the room. The morning buffet was great with Vietnamese and international cuisine available. We requested for a quiet room and the staff gave as the top floor which we appreciated greatly. There’s a pool and gym as well but unfortunately did not bring our sports attire but everything looks clean. Will book this hotel again when I’m back at HCM.

Just a quick note, we came back to our hotel for a quick nap in the afternoon on one of the day and happened to clash with the room cleaning timing. The staff knocked on our door a few times even though we have switched the ‘Do not disturb’ sign on. But all’s good because they came back shortly after we left for our schedule in the evening.

The cushion on bed is also the thing i don like, it is very soft and make my back feel un-comfort. 
Generally, this hotel is acceptable for traveller who don require much about comfort but location.

reviews.title: Ok, but would look for a better option next time.
reviews.positives:
Great location - just a kilometre from the Opera House, Takashimaya, and Saigon Square.
Very prompt, courteous, friendly, and efficient staff in reception, bell desk, concierge, and restaurant.
A very large, generous-sized room (suite) and bathroom.
reviews.negatives:
A bunch of small things undermined what could have been a much better experience:
(1) The restaurant had a somewhat limited breakfast buffet spread - as an international chain in a major metropolis, one would expect certain standard items like cereal (cornflakes, wheatflakes, bran, with cold milk) and grilled potatoes/tomatoes/vegetables everyday, but these were missing.
(2) The bathroom had a very generous shower area and bathtub, but the sink was so tiny and cramped in complete contrast.
(3) Water pressure in the shower and the toilet spray was extremely poor - we complained on day one, but they couldn't fix it.
(4) Insufficient lighting above the sink, especially while shaving.
(5) No place to hang hand towels (napkins) near the sink
(6) They are a bit stingy with drinking water - only 2 bottles (350 ml each) are provided per day. There were two more bottles in the mini-fridge, but a prominent sign warned us that these were chargeable. Which hotel of this category charges for water?????
(7) No air-conditioning in the lifts - the ride to/from our 10th floor suite was unbearably suffocating, especially in May when it's 35 degrees outside with 80% humidity.
All these things added up to a lot of disappointment, especially when we're paying top dollar for a suite-category room.

reviews.title: Great location - Reception staff could do with some "friendly" polish
reviews.text: Nice new Hotel in a great location (for me). Quite a few finer details missing. The rooms are comfortable - asked for a double bed, got 2 x mediums. No hooks in the bathroom, shampoo but no conditioner, tiny shower gel enough for one shower. Nowhere to put your own products in the shower cubicle - only the floor. If you have a pool then it's a good idea to supply guests with robes especially when there is nowhere to put your stuff when you decide to go for a swim.No products in the shower area by the pool either and only guests allowed (I believe). Breakfast great if you're Asian. Westerners not much to write home about. Wifi great and fast - make sure you have security on your device as it's currently open. TV also good - HD and lots of news and movie channels if you've time to watch. I've stayed in MT's before and have been very happy and my comments here today are not criticisms but observations -all of which would be very easy to "fix" with great management!

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text:
This hotel is about 1 year old. So if you like enjoying at new hotel. This hotel is good. It's about 15mins walk to Vincom shopping mall or 20mins walk to main walking strip

They upgraded me to one of their best room available.  Amazing! Love the room (see pictures) I asked them if I want to extend my stay how much would they charged. Cost 560000vnd for late checked out until 6pm or They offered me if stay 1 more night would cost 1.1million vnd. When I want to accepted their offer, they change their mind and wanting to charge 3.5millions.. so unprofessional!! Anyway that's Asia for you! Can change their minds like changing underwear. So I decided to do a last minute booking and booked at REX hotel! One of the best hotel in Saigon! Expensive because it was a last minute booking. Cost me $250AUD 1night just for deluxe room but whereas I booked again at REX HOTEL coming August 2nights governor suite only 57sqm cost $348AUD including breakfast

If you like this brand hotel They have over 80 brand new hotels all over Vietnam, some are still under construction. Personally I liked this hotel because it's brand new! So no mouldy smell for now, no bed bugs for now.  I had a great night sleep 😴 I would return if the price is right.

Staff at this hotel can be improved, still have some kind of bad attitude consider they rate themselves to be a 4stars hotel. You would expect bad attitude only between 1-3stars hotels but anything above 4stars, you would expect better. Sadly not always, bottom line to me who cares about bad service as long as I don't feel I'm getting rip off!

Tips: using uber and grab to get around is very good and cheap. Eg. At the airport transport service will tried charging you from airport to hotel cost about 220,000 to 300,000vnd but whereas using grab cost about 70,000 & 100k vnd. Either way both types of transport are cheap if you are a foreigners but if you are on a budget using uber or grab is a great way to get around

reviews.title: The honest review
reviews.text:
ok so i stayed from April 25th to May 2nd in the Premium Deluxe King...it is not your modern hotel, but it was that kind of standardised 4 star hotel you would have been in in the early 2000s, but still comfortable enough to stay.

Firstly: to the tourists, be nice, manners and consideration, there was like 1 service staff and 1 kitchen staff running the floor outside on the 26th morning (those which are visible to the public), you can be nice when in Japan, let the habit be global, be more aware of your surroundings

2nd: commendations to the chef in the above photo, as well as the kitchen and service team from the 26th to the 30th, everything was wonderful, i always had a great morning at breakfast, i would also like to commend this teeny tiny waitress staff...i believe she was around from the 28th to the 30th, excellent customer service

Third: THE BAD, oh my god the other staff members, the first group from 25-30 April, can work through Hung Kings Festival and do their best, but on the first (1st) and second (2nd) of May, Post Liberation Day, Labour Day, and Post Labour Day, this second group of workers cant even be decent? having a taller chef's hat and a higher chef's position doesnt necessarily make you a better chef, burnt eggs and omelettes? not listening to the customers request? Pho Bo full of fat instead of meat? Pho Ga full of bones instead of meat? WT... i strongly suggest a review on the breakfast teams of the 1st and 2nd May, because it was a horrible unpleasant end to my stay

and the front desk on night shift too on the 1st of May oh my god

Lack of professionalism: being unhappy doesnt give you the right to take it out on the guests, shame

Additional note: Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai Road next  to the hotel, that entire street seems to feature Ha Noi cuisine, hotel guest can check it out
reviews.response:

We truly value your feedback and hope to welcome you again with a better experience.

Best regards,
Nguyễn Duy Nhật Nam (Mr.)
General Manager

reviews.text: I arrived at the hotel at 1:10 PM hoping to check in and rest because I was a bit tired, but the receptionist said that I could only check in at 2 PM according to the policy. I understand that this is the hotel's policy, but the receptionist did not seem to recognize the customer's feelings and the need for more attention. In fact, while waiting for over 30 minutes near 2 PM, I noticed the receptionist was very indifferent when I asked about my check-in, engaging in private conversation and only focusing on the computer screen as if looking for something. I am very disappointed with the service of the Mường Thanh hotel reception team on the afternoon of April 19, 2025. I hope that the hotel management will retrain the reception staff to better meet service quality standards.

reviews.title: Worth it
reviews.text:
This is a very new hotel and therefore it is worth to stay. The location is not good for people who loves easy access to city centre. But I personally find that it is a good location as it is in the middle of the different tourist attraction and walkable distance. The Ben Thanh Market is just 15 mins walking distance and the Tan Dinh Market is also about 15 mins walking distance of the opposite direction. The different tourist area is also walking distance. There are good restaurant and food stall and also coffee area near to the hotel including a familymart. The staff are very helpful and friendly although some of their english is not that good. The breakfast was normal and not really fantastic. They have a coconut spa located on the 4th level which is good but is slightly expensive as it is more of a luxury experience. There is the same coconut spa which is of different name that is located very near the Ben Thanh Market and is from the same person. But of cos you cant expect the same luxury and environment there. 

I would definitely recommend this hotel as it is still very new. I might consider going back to stay if I am going back HCMC.

reviews.title: New and sparkling clean
reviews.text: Overall we had a good stay at the Muong Thanh Hotel. The hotel was brand new and I preferred the location to other very touristy areas of the city. It's a short taxi ride to anywhere and if you enjoy walking like we do, it's not hard to get around. Our room was new, comfortable and I would even say chic! The hotel itself was great but there seemed to be a few things they needed to be straighten out. I agree with other reviewers that it's a bit odd to be in such a nice hotel and then have to set my shampoos and everything on the shower floor because there is nowhere to put them. Also, our hot water was not very reliable. Having a cold shower at the end of a hot day walking around is not bad, but a cold shower first thing in the morning after spending the night in an air-conditioned room is not very pleasant. Personally, I was pretty disappointed that smoking is allowed inside the enclosed breakfast dining room, but I know that this is common practice for Vietnamese restaurants. Our room also smelled like cigarette smoke when we first arrived, eventually airing out after our 4 night stay. Breakfast was average, but was included with our room so there's not much I can complain about. If it hadn't been included I would have spent a better dollar elsewhere. It was also curious that we had some sort of water leak coming into our room from next door and drilling on the other side but not a word was said to us as far as an explanation or apology. All this to say that there are some minor drawbacks, but nothing too serious to make me not want to stay there again. I'm sure these are all kinks to be ironed out with such a new facility. I would probably try this hotel out again in the future.
reviews.positives: Brand new rooms,nice location, pool view

reviews.title: Good Hotel but can become excellent
reviews.text:
This hotel has a lot of pros. Its location. Its breakfast. Rooms and facilities, friendly staff. There are however a few things that made our stay a bit uncomfortable. The hotel does not provide for an iron box and iron board to iron the clothes. There is no place nearby that you can get your clothes ironed. After 10 in the morning even the hotel delivers your clothes the next day only. The iron box is a basic requirement. 

The Massage center is located on 4th floor but is neither welcoming, nor there is a friendly staff. You feel quite odd there, hence even though we wanted to go there we never went. 

The breakfast in the morning is open till 9:30, which is very good, but unfortunately there are hardly one or two vegerarian options. The break fast is neither western, nor asian. Mix of little bit of everything.

Check in is very smooth. We did not bring our electric converter and got one at the reception. There is a good welcome drink. Getting taxis from here is very easy. The reception has no tourist information. You need to do all that before reaching here.

•	The breakfast buffet had plenty of options but was mediocre. Nothing was hot (including the coffee), and food was not replenished in a timely manner, leaving trays empty.

Một lần nữa, khách sạn cám ơn anh/chị đã lựa chọn Mường Thanh là điểm dừng chân trong những chuyến đi. Hẹn gặp lại anh/chị trong thời gian sớm nhất.
Trân trọng,
Trần Mạnh Hùng (Mr.) – General Manager

reviews.title: There are better values
reviews.text: This hotel is somewhat overpriced compared to others in the area.  Breakfast food is Ok.  The hotel requires the key card to be in the room all time to keep the air cool.  The staff will not issue an extra key for this purpose.  Staff members need training on sanitary regarding digging their nostrils in plain sight.
